title: max(),min() and sum() include nil
key_bug_features: Aggregation functions include nil values in calculations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id int, value int, description text);
CREATE TABLE test2 (ref_id int, amount float, status boolean);
INSERT INTO test2 VALUES (1, 15.5, TRUE), (2, NULL, FALSE), (3, 25.0, NULL);
SELECT MIN(value), MAX(value), SUM(value) FROM test1 UNION SELECT MIN(amount), MAX(amount), SUM(amount) FROM test2;
